summary: Full regression of PureNorth Städ after color refactor + 2 new sections (BeforeAfter, Testimonials). Backend: 14/14 pytest pass (root, auth login/me ok/err, public booking create incl. Annat, list bookings auth/no-auth, full lifecycle POST/PATCH/DELETE with id field, cleanup). Frontend: home loads, no console errors; sections #vart-arbete and #omdomen render with correct content; both Before/After sliders are interactive (range value changes from 50 to 20 and triggers re-render via input event); all 3 testimonial cards render with stars + Swedish reviews. Booking regression PASS: name/email/phone/date/Hemstädning + Annat textarea reveal + booking-submit -> booking-success shown. Admin regression PASS: login -> dashboard -> booking row appears with real Mongo id (e.g. 6a33e35fd1fc7be4f21c37cc) in data-testid, status select successfully changed 'new' -> 'contacted' (persisted), and delete removed the row with confirmation toast 'Bokning borttagen.'. Previous _id/id serialization bug from iteration 1 is FULLY RESOLVED (response_model_by_alias=False applied to POST/GET /api/bookings).

issues: Browser tab <title> in /app/frontend/public/index.html still defaults to 'Emergent | Fullstack App' instead of PureNorth Städ branding.

action_items: Optional/cosmetic: update <title> in /app/frontend/public/index.html to 'PureNorth Städ — Städfirma i Umeå' or similar.
critical_code_review_comments: PATCH /api/bookings/{id}/status still accepts any arbitrary status string — recommend validating against {'new','contacted','done'} (Literal type or enum).
Admin.jsx imports useNavigate but does not use it (minor dead code).
Backend uses deprecated FastAPI on_event hooks — migrate to lifespan eventually (non-blocking).

success_rate.frontend: 100% — home, sections, sliders, testimonials, booking, admin login/status/delete all OK

seed_data_creation: Created and then deleted one TEST_AutoBooking via UI; cleanup test also removes any TEST_ prefixed bookings via API.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All flows from the original request now pass end-to-end. No outstanding bugs. If new features are added, re-run /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py first, then exercise the home page sections and the booking->admin lifecycle as done here.
rca_of_the_issue: Previous iteration's CRITICAL admin status/delete bug (id returned as '_id') is fixed in /app/backend/server.py via response_model_by_alias=False on POST/GET /api/bookings endpoints. Verified in this run: admin dashboard rendered data-testid='booking-row-6a33e35fd1fc7be4f21c37cc' and PATCH/DELETE worked using that id.
